memory.denseEmbeddingModelDescription: Select the third-party embedding model used before local rerank.

memory.denseQdrantCollectionDescription: Dense mode writes to the Qdrant collection. Current/default collection: {collection}.

modeDescriptions.off: Don't build a long-term memory index; keep only the basic file memory.
modeDescriptions.sparse: Match memories by keyword, using the optional sparse retrieval service.
modeDescriptions.dense: Turn memories into vectors with an embedding model and retrieve by semantic similarity.

toolApproval.title: Tool Call Approval
toolApproval.intro: Review actions before this bot writes files or runs commands.

tools.read: Read files and list directories inside the workspace
tools.write: Write files, edit files, and apply patches inside the workspace
tools.exec: Execute shell commands inside the container

toolApproval.toolDisabledHint: Approval is currently off for this operation. The rules below take effect only after enabling the switch.
toolApproval.bypassHint: Calls matching any of these patterns are auto-approved without prompting.
toolApproval.mustReviewHint: Calls matching any of these patterns always trigger approval, even when this tool is otherwise auto-approved.

hooks.title: Hooks
hooks.subtitle: Run workspace actions around tool calls, approvals, turns, memory, channels, and runtime events.
hooks.missingDescription: No hooks file exists yet; the editor is showing a starter template.
hooks.enabledDescription: Hooks are enabled for matching events.
hooks.disabledDescription: The hooks file exists but is disabled.
hooks.invalidDescription: The JSON file is not valid yet.
hooks.actionsDescription: Commands and tool calls configured by matching hooks.
hooks.testEventDescription: Run the saved hooks file against a synthetic payload.

bots.title: Bots
bots.createBotWaitHint: First-time creation may pull base images and take a moment.
bots.createBotSetupDesc: Creating the bot and workspace container. The page will open it automatically when it is ready.
bots.createBotLocalHint: Local bots use a folder on this computer and are not sandboxed.

create.terminalSubtitle: Provisioning the workspace container. You'll be taken to your bot automatically when it's ready.
create.failedSubtitle: Something went wrong while setting up the workspace.

bots.workspaceBackendHint: Container workspaces are isolated. Local workspaces run directly on this computer.
bots.localWorkspacePathPlaceholder: Choose a folder on this computer
bots.localWorkspaceWarning: Local workspaces run with host user permissions and have full access to host files and commands
bots.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bot?
bots.emptyDescription: Click the button above to create your first bot
bots.name: URL Name
bots.nameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes. Used in the bot URL.

nameStatus.invalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes (2-63 chars)

bots.timezoneInheritedHint: Leave empty to inherit the user's timezone, or fall back to the system timezone.
bots.aclPresetDescription: Start with a standard ACL preset. You can tweak it later in Channel Access.
bots.aclPresetHint: Tip: use 'Private Only' for personal bots, 'Group Only' or 'Group and Thread' for community bots, and 'Allow All' to stay completely open.
bots.aclPresetHelp: This sets up your default ACL effect and initial rules. You can adjust them anytime from the Channel Access page.

allowAll.title: Allow All
allowAll.description: Adds no extra restriction and allows all conversation types by default.

privateOnly.title: Private Only
privateOnly.description: Defaults to deny and only allows private conversations.

groupOnly.title: Group Only
groupOnly.description: Defaults to deny and only allows group conversations.

groupAndThreadOnly.title: Group and Thread
groupAndThreadOnly.description: Defaults to deny and allows group conversations plus threads.

denyAll.title: Deny All
denyAll.description: Defaults to deny and adds no rules, so you can configure access manually later.

bots.editAvatarDescription: Set the image URL for the bot avatar.
bots.editTimezoneDescription: Set a timezone override for this bot.

backup.cardSubtitle: Export or import the full bot as a portable .memoh.zip bundle.
backup.dropzoneTitle: Click to select or drag a backup file here
backup.exportDescription: Export bot configuration, history, attachments, and workspace files for restore, device transfer, or sharing. Set a passphrase to encrypt the bundle; otherwise credentials are stored in plaintext — keep the file safe.
backup.importDescription: Upload a .memoh.zip backup file, preview it, then create a copy or overwrite the current bot.
backup.passphraseExportHint: Encrypts the whole bundle. You will need this passphrase to import it. It cannot be recovered.
backup.encryptedHint: Enter the passphrase used when exporting to unlock it.

tabs.overviewSubtitle: Where this bot lives and how it's set up.

container.title: Workspace
container.subtitle: The isolated runtime where this bot edits files and runs commands.
container.botNotReady: Bot lifecycle transition in progress. Container actions disabled.
container.empty: No container found. Create one to enable runtime tools.
container.legacyWarning: Old architecture detected. Recreate for full compatibility (data preserved automatically).
container.createHint: Container created from current image. Enable restore to recover preserved data.
container.createRestoreDataDescription: Existing backups or legacy data will be restored into `/data` automatically.
container.createImageDescription: Docker image for the container base (e.g. debian:bookworm-slim). Leave empty for default.
container.createAdvancedDescription: Configure GPU access and raw CDI device mappings.
container.createGpuDescription: Attach host GPU access to the new container.
container.createGpuDevicesDescription: Enter one CDI device per line or use commas. Turning GPU off clears saved preferences.
container.gpuDevicesRequired: At least one CDI device is required for GPU.
container.gpuRecreateHint: GPU changes require recreation. A simple start/stop will not update devices.
container.deleteConfirm: Delete this container permanently? Unpreserved data cannot be recovered.
container.deletePreserveConfirm: Export `/data` and then delete this container?
container.rollbackConfirm: Roll back to this snapshot version?
container.snapshotNameHint: User-visible display name; system generates internal name.
container.metricsSubtitle: CPU, memory, and storage usage and limits.
container.metricsUnsupported: Resource monitoring not supported by backend.
container.metricsStopped: Container not running; viewing storage only.

resourceLimits.title: Resource Limits
resourceLimits.subtitle: Set CPU, memory, and storage limits for this bot workspace. Empty or 0 means unlimited.
resourceLimits.cpuHint: Hard limit on supported container and VM backends.
resourceLimits.memoryHint: Hard limit on supported container and VM backends.
resourceLimits.storageHint: Reserved for VM hard limits; container backends currently track it as a soft limit.
resourceLimits.storageSoftOnly: This container backend cannot enforce storage as a hard limit yet. The value is saved and reported as a soft limit, and the same API is reserved for future VM enforcement.
resourceLimits.storageSoftExceeded: Storage usage is above the configured soft limit.
resourceLimits.recreatePrompt: Saved. Rebuild the container now to apply CPU or memory hard limits. `/data` will be preserved, but running processes and shell sessions will stop.
resourceLimits.recreateConfirm: Rebuild now? Memoh will preserve `/data`, recreate the container with the new limits, then restore `/data`.
resourceLimits.saveRequiresRecreate: Resource limits saved. Rebuild to apply them.
resourceLimits.invalidNumber: {field} must be zero or a positive number.

container.dataSubtitle: Manage import, export, and restore for `/data`.
container.deleteSubtitle: Confirm whether to preserve `/data` before deletion.

refactored.runtimeUnavailable: Resource usage isn't available right now.
refactored.issueLegacyHint: Recreate for full compatibility. Data is preserved automatically.
refactored.issueRecreateHint: CPU or memory hard limits need a workspace rebuild to take effect. /data is preserved, but running sessions stop.
refactored.stopDialogBody: The runtime stops and anything it's running right now ends. Your files are kept — you can start it again anytime.
refactored.deleteDialogBodyKeep: The workspace will be removed. A copy of its data is kept so you can restore it into a new one.
refactored.deleteDialogBodyWipe: The workspace and all of its data will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.
refactored.deleteKeepDesc: Back up /data first, so a new workspace can recover it.
refactored.emptyDescription: Create one to enable runtime tools for this bot.

blocks.contextDescription: Configure how this bot remembers and processes information.
blocks.interactionDescription: Configure how the bot engages in conversations.
blocks.multimediaDescription: Configure voice and image generation models.

settings.titleModelDescription: Pick a lightweight model to automatically title conversations. Leave empty to disable.
settings.sparseStatusHint: Markdown files are the source of truth. Syncing rebuilds the Qdrant index from /data/memory.
settings.denseStatusHint: Markdown files are the source of truth. Syncing rebuilds the dense Qdrant index from /data/memory.
settings.mem0StatusHint: Markdown files are the source of truth. Syncing rebuilds Mem0 memories from /data/memory.
settings.indexedMemoryStatusPendingSave: Save the selected memory provider before viewing indexed memory status or running a sync.
settings.memorySyncSuccess: Sync completed: {fsCount} source entries, {restoredCount} restored, {storageCount} indexed.
settings.imageModelDescription: Model used for the generate_image tool. Must support image-output compatibility.
settings.videoModelDescription: Model used for the generate_video tool.
settings.heartbeatDescription: Periodically trigger agent to check for items that need attention
settings.heartbeatModelDescription: Select a model for heartbeat checks. Defaults to the bot's chat model if not set.
settings.compactionDescription: Automatically summarize older messages when context gets too large
settings.compactionRatioDescription: The percentage of older messages to summarize. Recent messages are kept intact.
settings.compactionModelDescription: Select a model for summarization. Defaults to the bot's chat model if not set.
settings.showToolCallsInIMDescription: Show live tool execution status (running / complete / failed) directly in the chat. Disabled by default.
settings.displayEnabledDescription: Launch Xvnc alongside the container. Restart the workspace for this to take effect.
settings.desktopEnabledDescription: Give this bot a screen it can see and control, for browsing and desktop apps. You can watch it live and take over anytime.
settings.toolApprovalDescription: Require human approval for read, write, and exec operations, with bypass templates for safe paths or commands.
settings.acpProviderRequired: Select and authorize an OpenAI Codex provider.
settings.acpOAuthUnavailable: Codex auth cannot be written to the current workspace.
settings.acpClaudeOAuthUnavailable: Claude Code auth cannot be saved for the current workspace.
settings.acpClaudeOAuthCodeHint: Paste the authorization code Claude shows after sign-in.
settings.acpSelfModeHint: Uses the ACP agent you've already configured inside the workspace runtime (e.g. an existing login).
settings.acpHermesSelfModeHint: Uses the Hermes profile already configured in this workspace. In local mode this can share the host ~/.hermes credentials; use API Key setup for bot-scoped credentials.
settings.acpEmptyDescription: No ACP profiles are available for this server.
settings.networkSDWANSectionHint: Put this bot on a private network so you can reach it at a stable address — and, if you like, send its traffic out through a location you choose.
settings.networkLogoutConfirm: Sign out of this network? The bot will disconnect until it signs in again.
settings.networkStatusPendingSave: Unsaved changes — save to apply them and see the live status.

networkWorkspaceState.task_stopped: Workspace not running or task not started

settings.networkNeedsLoginDescription: Authentication required. Open the link below to log in to your SD-WAN provider.
settings.networkNeedsLoginHint: Once logged in via your browser, return here to refresh.
settings.networkExitNodeDescription: Send this bot's outbound traffic through one of the available locations.
settings.networkNodesPendingSave: Save the current network settings before refreshing the node list.
settings.networkNodesEmpty: No exit node candidates yet. Ensure the bot workspace is running and networking is connected.
settings.networkNodesRefreshFailed: Failed to refresh exit node list
settings.allowGuestPersonalHint: ACL rules apply to all bot types.
settings.deleteBotDescription: Deleting this bot cannot be undone. Proceed with caution.

access.title: Access Control
access.subtitle: Control who can reach and manage this bot — from IM channels and from your workspace.

userAccess.title: Workspace Members
userAccess.subtitle: Control which registered platform users can manage or configure this bot from the web app.
userAccess.empty: No workspace members have explicit access yet.
userAccess.atLeastOnePermission: At least one permission is required.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Per channel identity, control who can chat with this bot and who can manage it. Linked workspace members inherit Manage automatically.
members.emptyWhitelist: No allowed members yet. Add a channel identity to allow chat or grant Manage.
members.emptyBlacklist: No blocked identities yet. Block a channel identity here, or use Manage without changing Chat.
members.empty: No members yet. Add a channel identity to allow chat or grant Manage.
members.platformMemberHint: This channel identity is linked to a workspace member of this bot, but that member has no Manage permission. Tick Manage to grant it just for this channel.
members.inheritedFollowing: Manage is inherited from this member's workspace role and follows the workspace. Untick to override it just for this channel.
members.overrideActive: Manage is set locally for this channel and no longer follows the workspace.
members.removeConfirm: Remove all channel access for this identity?

access.defaultEffectDescription: Applied when no rule matches an inbound message.
access.modeDescription: Choose whether messages are allowed or blocked by default. List entries override the default mode.
access.blacklistModeDescription: Allow everyone by default, then block the entries on the blacklist.
access.blacklistModeHint: Default is allow. New entries are added to the blacklist.
access.whitelistModeDescription: Block everyone except those you explicitly allow.
access.whitelistModeHint: Default is deny. New entries are added to the whitelist.
access.blacklistDescription: Anyone on this list is blocked.
access.whitelistDescription: Only people on this list get through.
access.blacklistEmptyDescription: No blocks active. Anyone not matched by other rules is allowed.
access.whitelistEmptyDescription: No allowed entries yet. Anyone not matched by other rules is blocked.
access.userQuestion: Which User Does This Apply To?
access.rulesEmptyDescription: Add a rule to override the default behavior.
access.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?
access.specificConversationDescription: Most people don't need this. Use it only if you want to target a single group, DM, or thread.
access.noObservedConversations: We haven't seen any conversations matching this yet. You can enter IDs manually below, or wait for the bot to show up in those chats.
access.manualConversationIdsHint: Only use this if you can't find the chat in history. You'll need to grab the IDs directly from the platform.
access.pickTargetForConversationSearch: Choose a platform or user first to see their conversations.
access.pickIdentityForConversationSearch: Pick a user to search their chat history.
access.pickChannelTypeForConversationSearch: Pick a platform to search its chat history.

channels.title: Platforms
channels.emptyDescription: Click below to add an access platform for this bot
channels.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this platform?
channels.webhookCallbackHint: Use this URL as the webhook callback URL in the platform console.
channels.lineWebhookCallbackHint: Use this URL in the LINE Developers Messaging API webhook settings. The base URL must be a public HTTPS origin that routes /channels/... to the Memoh server.
channels.wechatOAWebhookCallbackHint: Use this URL as the callback URL in the WeChat Official Account platform.
channels.webhookCallbackPending: Save this platform configuration to generate the callback URL.
channels.webhookCallbackPublicBasePending: The platform configuration is saved. Configure a public HTTPS webhook base or wait for the tunnel to become ready.
channels.lineWebhookPublicBaseMissing: Set MEMOH_WEBHOOK_PUBLIC_BASE_URL on the server or enable Cloudflare Quick Tunnel before configuring LINE.
channels.lineWebhookPublicBaseInvalid: The LINE webhook base must be a public HTTPS origin without path, port, localhost, private IPs, userinfo, query, or fragment.
channels.lineWebhookTunnelStarting: Creating a Cloudflare Quick Tunnel. The public callback URL will appear here shortly.
channels.lineWebhookTunnelUnavailable: Cloudflare Quick Tunnel is unavailable. Check cloudflared configuration or use a public HTTPS base URL.
channels.lineWebhookSetFailed: Failed to update LINE webhook endpoint
channels.lineWebhookSaveFirst: Save this platform configuration before setting the LINE webhook endpoint.
channels.linePublicMediaLimit: LINE outbound images need a configured public HTTPS base or Cloudflare Quick Tunnel; images must be PNG/JPEG and stay within LINE size limits.
channels.feishuWebhookSecurityHint: For security, webhook mode requires either an Encrypt Key or a Verification Token; an unprotected public callback URL should not be exposed.
channels.feishuWebhookSecretRequired: For security, configure at least one of Encrypt Key or Verification Token.
channels.noAvailableTypes: All platform types have been configured
channels.deleteWarning: Deleting this connection cannot be undone. Proceed with caution.

weixinQr.title: QR Code Login
weixinQr.description: Scan the QR code with WeChat to connect your account.
weixinQr.waitingScan: Open WeChat and scan this QR code

memory.title: Memories
memory.empty: The bot will accumulate memories through conversations, or you can add them manually.
memory.contentPlaceholder: Write the memory content here (Markdown supported)...
memory.compactConfirm: This will merge similar content using AI and may reduce the number of entries.
memory.compactUnsupported: The selected memory provider does not support semantic memory compaction.
memory.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this memory? This cannot be undone.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.intro: Manage installed plugin bundles and their hidden MCP resources.
plugins.emptyDescription: Install plugins from Supermarket to add bundled MCP resources and skills.
plugins.uninstallConfirm: Uninstall this plugin and remove its managed resources?
plugins.purgeConfirm: Permanently delete this plugin installation record and config?

skills.title: Skills
skills.discoveryDescription: Manage where this bot stores managed skills and which external paths are scanned.
skills.managedPathHint: "Copy to Managed Path" copies an external skill here. Managed copies take precedence.
skills.discoveryPathsDescription: Memoh scans these absolute paths for compatible external skills. One path per line.
skills.discoveryEmpty: No external skill paths. Only managed and legacy skills will be scanned.
skills.discoveryPathReserved: This path is reserved for Memoh-managed or legacy skills
skills.emptyDescription: Create a managed skill or scan external paths to get started.
skills.shadowedHint: A managed copy with the same name takes precedence over this source.
skills.overrideTitle: Edit to create a managed copy
skills.adoptFailed: Failed to copy skill to managed path
skills.intro: Configure custom abilities for this bot. Managed skills take precedence.

compaction.title: Compaction Logs
compaction.disableNote: Compaction will stop after you save this change.
compaction.emptyHint: Logs appear after the bot compacts its conversation history.
compaction.logsDisabledHint: Enable compaction to start collecting logs.
compaction.filterEmpty: No logs matching the selected status filter.
compaction.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all compaction logs? This cannot be undone.

heartbeat.title: Heartbeat Logs
heartbeat.disableNote: Heartbeat will stop after you save this change.
heartbeat.logsDisabledHint: Enable Heartbeat to start collecting logs.
heartbeat.firstCheckHint: The first check will run in about {minutes} minutes.
heartbeat.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all heartbeat logs? This cannot be undone.
heartbeat.description: Heartbeat allows the bot to periodically scan for items needing attention, ensuring tasks are processed even when not directly messaged.
heartbeat.filterEmpty: No logs matching the selected status filter.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.name: Name
schedule.deleteConfirm: Delete task "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
schedule.dangerZoneDesc: Task deletion is permanent. Proceed with caution.

form.name: Task Name
form.commandHint: This command is sent to the bot as a message upon triggering.
form.manualEditHint: Manual edits will sync with the visual builder.
form.advancedHint: Supports standard Cron format and @daily descriptors.

modeHint.hourly: Trigger once every hour, at a given minute.
modeHint.daily: Trigger every day at the selected hours.
modeHint.weekly: Trigger on the selected days of the week.
modeHint.monthly: Trigger on the selected days of the month.
modeHint.yearly: Trigger once a year on a specific month and day.
modeHint.advanced: Write a raw cron expression for full control.

history.title: History
history.deleteSelectedConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {count} message(s)? This will clear all history and cannot be undone.

usage.title: Usage
usage.selectBotPlaceholder: Choose a bot to view usage
usage.noData: No usage data for the selected period

supermarket.title: Supermarket
supermarket.selectBotPlaceholder: Choose a bot to install to...
supermarket.author: Author

welcome.title: Welcome to Memoh
welcome.subtitle: Your private AI agent platform
welcome.description: Let's set up your workspace in a few steps.

intro.title: Welcome to Memoh
intro.description:
Your private AI agent platform, on your own infra.
Zero telemetry, fully self-hosted.

provider.title: Configure AI Provider
provider.description: Pick a provider and drop in your API key.

form.name: Name
form.typeConflict: A provider with this name already exists with a different API format. Please use a different name.
form.errorHttpDescription: Please check your API key and base URL.
form.errorAuthDescription: The provider rejected your API key. Please check that it is correct and has not expired.
form.errorUnreachableDescription: Could not connect to this provider. Please verify your API key and base URL are correct.
form.errorNoModelsDescription: This provider may not expose a model list. You can retry or add models manually.

acp.oauthDeferredHint: Authorization happens in the next step, after the bot and its workspace are ready.
acp.selfHint: Reuses the agent already configured in the workspace.

model.hint: Pick the model your bot replies with. Recommended, but you can change it anytime in settings.

acp.banner: This bot will use {agent} as its primary agent
acp.oauthDescription: Once authorized, {agent} can run inside this bot's workspace. You can also skip and finish authorization later in bot settings.
acp.oauthCodeHint: After signing in on the popup, copy the authorization code and paste it below.
acp.selfRequiresLocalWorkspace: {agent} self-managed setup requires a local workspace. Switch the workspace backend to Local, or go back and choose API Key setup.

complete.title: You're All Set
complete.subtitle: Open Memoh and start your first conversation

im.title: IM channels
im.desc: Deploy your bot to Telegram and beyond

voice.title: Voice chat
voice.desc: TTS and STT give your bot a voice

search.title: Web search
search.desc: Plug in search engines for real-time info

complete.saveFailed: Failed to save, please try again
complete.noProviderWarning: You haven't configured an AI provider yet. Your bot won't be able to reply until you add one in Settings → Providers
